articles.title_en: China and Russia increased trade turnover by 19.7% in January - April
articles.lead_en: During this period, the export of Chinese products to the Russian Federation reached $37.83 billion, and the import of Russian goods to China - approximately $47.41 billion, the Main Customs Administration of the Republic reported.
articles.title_raw: Китай и Россия в январе - апреле нарастили товарооборот на 19,7%
articles.lead_raw: За этот период экспорт китайской продукции в РФ достиг $37,83 млрд, а импорт российских товаров в КНР - примерно $47,41 млрд, сообщило Главное таможенное управление республики

articles.title_en: Russian stock market ends week with declines in major indices
articles.lead_en: The yuan weakened by 2 kopecks to 10.92 rubles
articles.title_raw: Russian stock market ends week with declines in major indices
articles.lead_raw: The yuan weakened by 2 kopecks to 10.92 rubles

articles.title_en: Ministry of Commerce of the People's Republic of China: trade turnover between China and Russia is constantly being optimized
articles.lead_en: The department indicated that trade and economic cooperation between the two countries has overcome numerous challenges associated with the difficult international situation
articles.title_raw: Минкоммерции КНР: товарооборот Китая и России постоянно оптимизируется
articles.lead_raw: В ведомстве указали, что торгово-экономическое сотрудничество двух стран преодолело многочисленные вызовы, связанные со сложной международной обстановкой

articles.title_en: Russia’s budget deficit reaches $78.55 bln in January–April
articles.lead_en: According to the Russian Finance Ministry, the high deficit figures at the beginning of the year are primarily due to accelerated financing of expenditures
articles.title_raw: Russia’s budget deficit reaches $78.55 bln in January–April
articles.lead_raw: According to the Russian Finance Ministry, the high deficit figures at the beginning of the year are primarily due to accelerated financing of expenditures

articles.title_en: Expert points to risk of budget deficits in Russian Arctic regions
articles.lead_en: According to Svetlana Lipina, without comprehensive measures to strengthen the revenue base and optimize costs the risk will remain significant in 2026 - 2027
articles.title_raw: Expert points to risk of budget deficits in Russian Arctic regions
articles.lead_raw: According to Svetlana Lipina, without comprehensive measures to strengthen the revenue base and optimize costs the risk will remain significant in 2026 - 2027

articles.title_en: On May 11, the EU will impose sanctions against the Russian Federation for evacuating children from the combat zone
articles.lead_en: Personal sanctions of the European Union consist of blocking the banking assets of individuals in Europe, if they can be found there, and a ban on entry into the countries of the community
articles.title_raw: ЕС 11 мая введет санкции против РФ за эвакуацию детей из зоны боевых действий
articles.lead_raw: Персональные санкции Евросоюза заключаются в блокировании банковских активов физических лиц в Европе, если их удастся там найти, и запрете на въезд в страны сообщества

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market declines at the beginning of the main trading session
articles.lead_en: The yuan rose by 2.55 kopecks to 10.97 rubles
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций снижается в начале основной торговой сессии
articles.lead_raw: Курс юаня рос на 2,55 копейки, до 10,97 рубля

articles.title_en: Japan to send economic mission to Russia on May 26-27 — agency
articles.lead_en: According to the media outlet, companies such as Mitsui, Mitsui O.S.K. Lines and Mitsubishi may join the delegation, led by the country’s Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry
articles.title_raw: Japan to send economic mission to Russia on May 26-27 — agency
articles.lead_raw: According to the media outlet, companies such as Mitsui, Mitsui O.S.K. Lines and Mitsubishi may join the delegation, led by the country’s Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

articles.title_en: Dmitriev: the energy crisis has opened the EU's eyes wide shut
articles.lead_en: This is how the special representative of the Russian President for investment and economic cooperation with foreign countries commented on the Financial Times article on the EU’s preparation for potential negotiations with Russia
articles.title_raw: Дмитриев: энергетический кризис открыл широко закрытые глаза ЕС
articles.lead_raw: Так спецпредставитель президента РФ по инвестиционно-экономическому сотрудничеству с зарубежными странами прокомментировал статью газеты Financial Times о подготовке Евросоюза к потенциальным переговорам с Россией

articles.title_en: Expert Letenkov: in the Russian Federation, demand for the purchase of apartments has increased by 20% over the year
articles.lead_en: The buyer has become more careful and attentive to the transaction budget, said the general director of the Moscow Real Estate Investment Agency.
articles.title_raw: Эксперт Летенков: в РФ спрос на покупку квартир вырос на 20% за год
articles.lead_raw: Покупатель стал осторожнее и внимательнее относиться к бюджету сделки, сообщил генеральный директор "Агентства инвестиций в недвижимость Москвы"

articles.title_en: RBC: A1 wants to buy out the debts of one of the largest ice cream producers
articles.lead_en: "Russian Cold" is experiencing financial difficulties and needs investments in working capital of up to 1.5 billion rubles, the agency notes
articles.title_raw: РБК: А1 хочет выкупить долги одного из крупнейших производителей мороженого
articles.lead_raw: "Русский холод" испытывает финансовые трудности и нуждается в инвестициях в оборотный капитал до 1,5 млрд рублей, отмечает агентство

articles.title_en: Russian Economy Shrinks in the First Quarter
articles.lead_en: The 0.5% contraction in GDP significantly missed the Central Bank’s earlier projection of 1.6% annualized growth for the period.
articles.title_raw: Russian Economy Shrinks in the First Quarter
articles.lead_raw: The 0.5% contraction in GDP significantly missed the Central Bank’s earlier projection of 1.6% annualized growth for the period.

articles.title_en: Russia expects growth in trade turnover with Bangladesh — ambassador
articles.lead_en: Alexander Khozin noted that while the number of Russian companies operating in Bangladesh remains limited, their presence is noticeable and makes a significant contribution to the development of economic ties between the two countries
articles.title_raw: Russia expects growth in trade turnover with Bangladesh — ambassador
articles.lead_raw: Alexander Khozin noted that while the number of Russian companies operating in Bangladesh remains limited, their presence is noticeable and makes a significant contribution to the development of economic ties between the two countries

articles.title_en: The Central Bank noted signs of revival of business activity in the Russian economy in March and April
articles.lead_en: Domestic demand in the future can be supported, in particular, by the continued high rates of increase in household incomes, the Bank of Russia noted.
articles.title_raw: ЦБ отметил признаки оживления деловой активности в экономике РФ в марте и апреле
articles.lead_raw: Поддержку внутреннему спросу в дальнейшем могут оказывать, в частности, сохраняющиеся высокие темпы увеличения доходов населения, отметили в Банке России

articles.title_en: The Central Bank estimated inflation in Russia at the end of the first quarter at 5.9%
articles.lead_en: At the same time, annual inflation will drop to 4.5-5.5%, the Bank of Russia noted.
articles.title_raw: ЦБ оценил инфляцию в России на конец I квартала в 5,9%
articles.lead_raw: При этом годовая инфляция снизится до 4,5-5,5%, отметили в Банке России

articles.title_en: Bank of Russia sells yuan worth $186 mln with settlements on May 6

articles.lead_raw: The Central Bank did not sell yuan on the domestic market with settlements on May 5

articles.title_en: Dmitriev suggests hantavirus outbreak could be used to justify energy restrictions
articles.lead_en: The Russian presidential special representative for investment and economic cooperation commented on a report saying that Swiss authorities are urgently tracing contacts of a man hospitalized in Zurich with a strain of hantavirus capable of human-to-human transmission
